description: Automatically sends a personalized SMS to new callers whose calls were missed, creating a lead record and notifying the business owner.
outcome: Never lose a lead to a missed call again. Respond in under 60 seconds, 24/7.

templates.body: Hi! We missed your call to {{tenant.business_name}}. How can we help? Reply here or call us back at {{tenant.phone}}. - {{tenant.owner_first_name}}

templates.subject: Missed Call Alert: {{caller_phone}}
templates.body: You missed a call from {{caller_phone}} at {{call_time}}. An auto-text has been sent. View lead: {{lead_url}}

test_matrix.happy_path: Missed call from new number → SMS sent within delay → lead created → owner notified
test_matrix.missing_capability: SMS not configured → activation deferred → wizard launched for SMS setup
test_matrix.failed_provisioning: SMS send fails → retry 3x → alert generated → lead still created
test_matrix.rollback: Mid-activation failure → trigger deregistered → template unbound → tenant records cleaned
test_matrix.cancellation: Module deactivated → triggers disabled → existing leads preserved → config retained
test_matrix.reactivation: Module re-enabled → prior config restored → triggers re-registered → postflight validates

downgrade_behavior: Triggers disabled immediately. Lead records preserved. SMS history retained for 90 days. Configuration preserved for reactivation.

documentation.setup_guide: Connect your phone provider (CallScaler recommended), verify SMS capability with A2P registration, customize message template and quiet hours.
known_limitations: Quiet hours may delay response to next morning
Does not handle existing customer calls (new callers only)
documentation.support_runbook: Check SMS-iT delivery logs → verify A2P status → confirm webhook registration → test with manual missed call
